translations.en: Singularity
translations.zh: 獨一
translations.note: 魔像族第八德=人類 Humility 對應

translations.en: a finely-carved stone pyramid.
translations.zh: 一座雕工精細之石造金字塔。

translations.en: As you face the altar, a voice rings in your head.
translations.zh: 汝面對此祭壇之時，一個聲音響於汝心識之中。

translations.en: You understand it perfectly, but you can't recognize the language!
translations.zh: 汝盡解其意，卻認不出此乃何種語言！

translations.en: "There is no more wisdom for thee to acquire here, noble Avatar."
translations.zh: 「高貴的聖者，此處再無智慧可授汝。」

translations.en: "Seek the Codex, and may nothing impede thy sacred quest!"
translations.zh: 「去尋『知識寶典』吧——願無物阻汝之神聖追尋！」

translations.en: "Hast thou completed thy journey to the @catacombs?"
translations.zh: 「汝可已完成往@catacombs（地）下墓穴之行？」

translations.en: "What is the Mantra of Singularity?"
translations.zh: 「『獨一』之真言為何？」

translations.en: "Which catacomb dost thou seek?"
translations.zh: 「汝欲尋哪一座墓穴？」

translations.en: "Thy deeds make thee unworthy of enlightenment."
translations.zh: 「汝之行止令汝不配受啟悟。」

translations.en: "Return when thy path is more focused."
translations.zh: 「待汝心專志一之時再來。」

translations.en: "Thou hast far to travel and much to achieve, but thy inner fire will surely guide thy way."
translations.zh: 「汝前路尚遙、所為尚多，然汝心之內火必引汝之路。」

translations.en: "Thou hast far to travel and much to achieve."
translations.zh: 「汝前路尚遙、所為尚多。」

translations.en: "May the wisdom imparted here help purify thy inner flame."
translations.zh: 「願此處所授之智慧助汝淨化內焰。」

translations.en: "What do you seek, Avatar?"
translations.zh: 「聖者，汝所求為何？」

translations.en: "What is the Mantra of Singularity?"
translations.zh: 「『獨一』之真言為何？」

translations.en: "Look deep inside thyself, Avatar, and answer this:"
translations.zh: 「聖者，深察汝之內心，回答此問：」

translations.en: "For whom dost thou truly seek the Codex?"
translations.zh: 「汝究竟為誰而尋『知識寶典』？」

translations.en: "$0 is one of the guiding principles of the gargoyle race."
translations.zh: 「$0 乃魔像族之指引原則之一。」

translations.en: "Go thou into the @Catacombs of $0, near the coast to the $1 of here."
translations.zh: 「請往$0之@Catacombs（地）下墓穴，於此處$1之海岸附近。」

translations.en: "There you will find the being who most exemplifies this @principle."
translations.zh: 「彼處汝將遇最足以代表此@principle（原）則之亡者。」

translations.en: "The three principles of @Control, @Passion and @Diligence form the basis of the gargoyle way of life."
translations.zh: 「@Control（控制）、@Passion（熱情）、@Diligence（勤勉）三原則乃魔像族生命之本。」

translations.en: "Thou hast reached the Altar of Singularity. What dost thou seek?"
translations.zh: 「汝已抵『獨一』之祭壇。汝所求何物？」

translations.en: "Which catacomb dost thou seek?"
translations.zh: 「汝欲尋哪一座墓穴？」

translations.en: The mystic voice falls silent, and you leave the altar.
translations.zh: 神秘之聲歸於靜默，汝離祭壇而去。

translations.en: "The answer to that lies elsewhere."
translations.zh: 「彼答案乃在他處。」

translations.en: "The answer to that lies within thyself."
translations.zh: 「彼答案乃在汝之內心。」

translations.en: "Let the principle of control guide thy quest."
translations.zh: 「願控制之則引汝之追尋。」

translations.en: "Let the principle of passion drive thy quest."
translations.zh: 「願熱情之則驅汝之追尋。」

translations.en: "Let the principle of diligence maintain thy quest."
translations.zh: 「願勤勉之則持汝之追尋。」

translations.en: "Then wilt thou truly achieve the unified spirit and singularity of purpose that is necessary for success in all endeavors."
translations.zh: 「如此汝方能真正達到精神之合一、志一之獨——萬事成就所必須之境。」

translations.en: "This is the gargoyle way; let it be thy way as well."
translations.zh: 「此乃魔像族之道；願亦為汝之道。」

translations.en: The altar glows with a cold blue flame.
translations.zh: 祭壇泛起冷藍之焰。

translations.en: You feel compelled to seek out the Codex.
translations.zh: 汝感一股莫之能禦之衝動，欲去尋『知識寶典』。

translations.en: Your final quest has begun!
translations.zh: 汝之終局之旅已然啟程！

translations.en: "You have not yet become familiar with the wisdom of the gargoyle race."
translations.zh: 「汝尚未通曉魔像族之智慧。」

translations.en: "Continue thy search."
translations.zh: 「繼續汝之追尋。」

translations.en: "Think again, Avatar: For whom dost thou seek the Codex?"
translations.zh: 「再思之，聖者：汝為誰而尋『知識寶典』？」

translations.en: "Thy answer is wise."
translations.zh: 「汝答得有智慧。」

translations.en: "But how canst thou truly work for the good of a race whose ways thou dost not understand?"
translations.zh: 「然汝若不明一族之道，又何以真正為其族謀福？」

translations.en: "Go thou into the @Catacombs of @Control, @Passion and @Diligence."
translations.zh: 「請往@Control（控制）、@Passion（熱情）、@Diligence（勤勉）之@Catacombs（地下墓穴）。」

translations.en: "In each wilt thou find the final resting place of the being who most exemplifies that @principle."
translations.zh: 「於每一處汝將見最足以代表彼@principle（原）則之亡者長眠之所。」

translations.en: "Return when thou hast found these @catacombs."
translations.zh: 「俟汝尋得此諸@catacombs（墓穴）之後再返。」

translations.en: "Thy answer is foolish."
translations.zh: 「汝答非智者之言。」

translations.en: "A journey made for selfish reasons can never be a sacred quest, regardless of its goal."
translations.zh: 「為一己之私而行，雖目標崇高，亦終非神聖之追尋。」

translations.en: "Thy answer is foolish."
translations.zh: 「汝答非智者之言。」

translations.en: "There is no nobility or honor in betraying one's own race for the sake of another."
translations.zh: 「為他族而背叛己族，無高貴可言，無榮譽可說。」

translations.en: "Such a path can never be a sacred quest."
translations.zh: 「此道永不能成為神聖之追尋。」

translations.en: "Thy answer is foolish."
translations.zh: 「汝答非智者之言。」

translations.en: "Thy compassion is acknowledged, but compassion is not the key to success."
translations.zh: 「汝之慈悲固然可嘉，然慈悲非成事之關鍵。」

translations.en: "The motive must be as one with the goal for a journey to become a sacred quest."
translations.zh: 「動機須與目標合一，旅程方能成神聖之追尋。」

translations.en: "Return when thou canst truly answer this question."
translations.zh: 「俟汝真能答此一問之時再返。」

translations.en: "Thy answer is foolish."
translations.zh: 「汝答非智者之言。」

translations.en: "Thy mind must be focused clearly on thy path for thy journey to become a sacred quest."
translations.zh: 「汝之心志須清明專一於汝之道，旅程方能成神聖之追尋。」

translations.en: Control
translations.zh: 控制

translations.en: Diligence
translations.zh: 勤勉

translations.en: Passion
translations.zh: 熱情

translations.en: west
translations.zh: 西

translations.en: south
translations.zh: 南

translations.en: east
translations.zh: 東

translator_notes: ★ U6 劇情核心 NPC：魔像族 Altar of Singularity，劇情倒轉之鍵。Singularity = 魔像族第八德（對應人類 Humility），譯『獨一』取『精神合一、志一之獨』之意，呼應結局『動機與目標合一』。三大原則 Control/Passion/Diligence 譯『控制/熱情/勤勉』為一致定譯。Codex 譯『知識寶典』保留古籍感，全句『Codex of Ultimate Wisdom』譯『終極智慧之寶典』。對話展開 quiz：為誰而尋 Codex，唯有 both/our/peac/all/ever（為兩族和平）才算智答。
